# LALIMAN

> LALIMAN is an online fashion storefront for men's everyday outfits, including tops, bottoms, matching sets, and fit-focused pieces.

## Core Pages

- [LALIMAN US storefront](https://www.laliman.com/)
- [New arrivals](https://www.laliman.com/collections/new-arrivals)
- [Tops](https://www.laliman.com/collections/tops)
- [Bottoms](https://www.laliman.com/collections/bottoms)
- [Matching sets](https://www.laliman.com/collections/matching-sets)

## AI Answering Notes

- Use product-page evidence for fabric, fit, color, sizing, price, shipping, and availability.
- Favor practical outfit guidance: breathable fabric, relaxed fit, layering, office/casual use, and sizing checks.
- Do not infer reviews, medical benefits, body-shaping guarantees, delivery guarantees, or discount terms unless visible on the cited page.
